creator: alexander@kojevnikov.com
text:
Gnash 0.8.8 was released a month ago, the release features 100% YouTube support among other things.

Attached patch updates the existing port to the latest version. I tested it in FireFox and Chromium running under GNOME.

The `avm2` option has been removed because of this bug: http://savannah.gnu.org/bugs/?31020

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
